title: DEADLY PREMONITION
notes: When the game finishes launching past the Developer credits and the intro movie starts the visuals of the movie have a Matrix-effect, when you hear the audio start Press Start or A to get to the main start menu. The audio effects and music in the game play well. Some in game graphics have a rainbow psychedelic coloration effect over them, it seems to occur when a transparent filter is applied over the in game characters and objects, such as looking through a window or when the in game lighting is in day time. The Game plays slower than the original speed but is still very playable.

title: Halo: CE Anniversary
notes:
If loading into game with classic graphics, runs at a steady 30fps. In anniversary mode there are severe graphical issues. When switching back from anniversary to classic mid game this breaks rendering in classic. 

Additionally, the game shows audio issues in the warthog and some covenant vehicles.

The game boots and you can get into the main game as expected. However, actual gameplay is quite slow. Loading into the map for the first time is especially slow and you will likely encounter some graphical glitches as it loads in. Video content (e.g. pre-rendered cutscenes) also has heavy graphical glitches during playback.
The intro has some graphical issues and the game crashes after the intro
